violations.text: Shellfish tags did not have the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. A new chlorine sanitizing solution was made at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chowder was placed hot in the walk-in freezer in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
